exploration_notes: The bug is in MailIndexer.ts where loadMailDetails() calls loadInChunks() for both MailDetailsBlob and MailDetailsDraft entities WITHOUT passing providedOwnerEncSessionKeys. The loadInChunks() helper method (line 780) doesn't even accept a session key parameter — it only takes (typeRef, listId, ids) and calls this._entity.loadMultiple(typeRef, listId, chunk) with just 3 arguments, omitting the 4th providedOwnerEncSessionKeys parameter.
